metadata.instruction: Set an alarm for 8.30 AM that repeats every Monday
metadata.context: I need an alarm to remind me to badge in to work.

focused_element.name: Terminal 4, python Use Alt+F1 for terminal accessibility help

l3.rationale: Esc cancelled the terminal interaction.

l4.rationale: Esc and Win were used to leave the terminal and bring up the app environment, then Esc dismissed the current Clock context, which is app-level navigation.

l5.rationale: Initial cancel/open window actions followed by focus navigation through buttons and list items indicate dismissing startup prompts and reaching the alarm setup screen.
